title: Trader Bets $14 Million That Losing Warner Bid Would Be Win for Netflix
description: An options trader appears to be betting almost $14 million that Netflix Inc. will win should it lose out on its bid to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery Inc.
content: An options trader appears to be betting almost $14 million that Netflix Inc. will win should it lose out on its bid to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery Inc.
